title: <div>  •  Unconscious (Design) gates – “what your body or aura broadcasts automa
content:
• Unconscious (Design) gates – “what your body or aura broadcasts automatically”
• Lines 1–6 – the fractal variants of each gate (each gate has 6 sub-frequencies)
We’ll focus first on the Activated Gates involved in your Defined Channels, then expand to major Personality/Design positions (Sun, Earth, etc.).
🎯 CORE GATE SUMMARY (from defined channels)
🔗 Channel 34–20
• Gate 34.5 – Power / Great Strength (Design)
◦ Line 5 = Delegation & Impact ◦ You wield energy in a way that influences groups. Natural for leadership or systems broadcast.
• Gate 20.4 – Now / Contemplation (Personality)
◦ Line 4 = Network-Activated Voice ◦ You speak when connected to others, not in a vacuum.
Narrative: Power that speaks when conditions are ripe. Not a random broadcaster—your words activate communities.
🔗 Channel 42–53
• Gate 42.3 – Completion / Growth (Design)
◦ Line 3 = Learning Through Error ◦ You mature by testing ideas and allowing full cycles.
• Gate 53.5 – Beginning / Initiative (Personality)
◦ Line 5 = Visionary Starter ◦ You initiate not just for self, but for systems. Your beginnings ripple outward.
context: From document: title: "Human Design Schedule Mapping" source: "https://chatgpt.com… — chunk 20 (chunk 20/57)
